column1: # GSE158430 (UC Davis FAANG, PRJNA665212) data-availability matrix
# Core 8 assays = NCBI BioSample SAMN (GSE158430). Hi-C / DNA methylation / Input added from related deposits (see notes).

# Core 7 columns (RNA-seq, ATAC/DNase, H3K27ac, H3K4me1, H3K4me3, H3K27me3, CTCF): NCBI GSE158430 = PRJNA665212 (SAMN). Open-chromatin = DNase-seq for chicken, ATAC-seq for cattle & pig. H3K9me3 was NOT assayed.
#   Chicken & Pig -> ENA PRJEB27364 'Hi-C of liver cells in livestock species, FAANG pilot FR-AgENCODE' (Foissac et al.). SAMEA. (study also has goat.)
#   Cattle -> ENA PRJEB101183 'HiC data for bovine liver' (adult). SAMEA. (different animals from GSE158430.)
#   Chicken & Pig -> RRBS, ENA ERP023800 (SAME FAANG animals: chicken CA/CB; pig P348/P350). SAMEA.
#   Chicken Hypothalamus -> substituted from chicken hypothalamus bisulfite PRJEB70935 (different animals).
#   Cattle -> bovine atlases (NCBI SAMN, different animals): Liver/Spleen/Adipose/Muscle/Lung=PRJNA612978 (WGBS); Cerebellum/Hypothalamus=PRJNA602582 (RRBS); Cortex=PRJNA748751.
# Input (ChIP-seq control): UC Davis FAANG ENA PRJEB14330 (same animals). ENA EXPERIMENT IDs (ERX); 2 per cell = 2 animals.
#   Spleen Input left blank: spleen ChIP exists (ERX3783178-ERX3783219) but input/antibody labels are not in public ENA metadata.
# Accession schemes: SAMN=NCBI BioSample; SAMEA=ENA/EBI BioSample; ERX=ENA experiment.
